title: hemizonia luzulifolia var. citrina
intro: Hemizonia luzulifolia var. citrina, also known as Golden Yarrow or Lemon Hemizonia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The plant's extracts have been known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Hemizonia luzulifolia var. citrina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
